title: BUG: Asset path mismatch in PreloadScene.js
description: PreloadScene is attempting to load images from 'assets/diagrams/' using underscores (e.g. volcano_cross_section.png). However, the actual files exist in 'public/assets/science/' and are hyphenated (e.g. volcano-cross-section.png). This causes Test Case 8 in the Sprint 3 Test Plan to fail.
close_reason: Fixed asset paths in PreloadScene to point to assets/science/ with proper hyphens
